    Rates may be changed or withdrawn at any time without notice.

    Some product restrictions may apply. Terms, Conditions, and Eligibility requirements for special products and rates may vary.

    1 Special rates are for owner occupied properties with amortization of 25 years or less and are subject to Servus lending criteria. Other conditions apply.

    Please contact your local branch or Member Contact Centre regarding rates for your unique financial situation.

    *"Prime" means the prime rate charged by Servus on Canadian dollar loans and it may change from time to time. The current prime rate can be obtained by calling us at 1.877.378.8728. Current variable interest rates will appear on each account statement.

    Currency Converter

    I want to convert:
    Amount:
    to
    Amount:
    Transaction fees may apply.

    Additional foreign currencies

    Servus can also provide other foreign currencies upon request. Just give us a call at 1.877.378.8728 or request a callback. We are able to offer the following currencies for purchase in our branches.

    • Australian Dollar
    • British Pound
    • Chinese Yuan
    • Dominican Republic Peso
    • Euro
    • Hong Kong Dollar
    • Jamaican Dollar
    • Japanese Yen
    • Malaysian Ringgit
    • Mexican Peso
    • New Zealand Dollar
    • Pakistan Rupee
    • Russian Ruble
    • Singapore Dollar
    • Swiss Franc
    • Taiwan Dollar
    • Thai Baht
    • US Dollar

    Foreign currency request form

    SERVUS CREDIT UNION, the SERVUS circle, FEEL GOOD ABOUT YOUR MONEY, and UNLIKE YOUR BANK, and all associated logos are trademarks owned by Servus Credit Union Ltd., whether or not denoted with ® or TM.

    We would like to acknowledge and share our deep gratitude for the Indigenous Peoples, including the Nêhiyawak (Cree), Saulteaux, Blackfoot, Dene, Nakota Sioux, Siksikaitsitapi, Siksika, Peigan-Piikani, and Kainai-Blood Tribe, Tsuu T’ina Nation, Stoney Nakoda First Nation, Métis Settlements, and the Métis Nation of Alberta, who have been stewards for the territories across Treaties 6, 7, and 8 on which our Servus community thrives.
